design_philosophy.core_concept: Race Control Dashboard meets Cyberpunk Gaming
design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Mode Only, High Contrast, Neon Accents, Carbon Fiber textures, Aerodynamic Shapes

usage_rules.h1: font-heading text-4xl md:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter italic
usage_rules.h2: font-heading text-2xl md:text-4xl uppercase tracking-tight italic
usage_rules.caption: font-data text-xs text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest

usage_guidelines.primary_action: bg-primary hover:bg-red-600 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105

grid_strategies.race_card: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center p-6 border-l-4 border-primary bg-card
grid_strategies.leaderboard_row: grid grid-cols-12 gap-2 items-center p-3 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5

shapes.special_effect: skew-x-[-10deg] for badges and labels to simulate speed

buttons.default: h-11 px-8 font-heading uppercase tracking-wider text-sm clip-path-slant

cards.base: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative group

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 h-12 text-lg font-body

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 h-16 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.desktop_sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 h-screen bg-zinc-950 border-r border-white/10 p-6

assets.icon_usage: Use stroke-width={1.5} for a thin, technical look. Size usually 20px or 24px.

universal_guidelines: Dark mode is NOT optional. It is the only mode.
Use 'Red' (#EF4444) for primary actions, but use it sparingly to maintain impact.
Borders should be subtle (opacity 10-20%) unless active/focused.
Typography hierarchy must be strict: Racing Sans One for impact, Chivo for reading, JetBrains Mono for data.
No gradients on text. Legibility is key for data.
Mobile-first: Touch targets must be at least 44px.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge`
Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom font families and colors defined in this JSON.
In `index.css`, import the Google Fonts at the very top.
Create a Layout component that handles the bottom navigation on mobile and sidebar on desktop.
Ensure the `Prediction` flow feels like a game—selecting a driver should highlight them with a 'selected' border and glow.
The Dashboard should show the 'Next Race' countdown prominently.
